actions.label: Pick up kettle
actions.description: The person reaches for and picks up the glass coffee kettle from the table.

actions.label: Position kettle to pour
actions.description: The person moves the kettle over the coffee equipment to begin the pouring process. The user holds the gooseneck kettle with their right hand, maneuvering it over the coffee dripper setup to prepare for pouring.

actions.label: Move kettle
actions.description: The person moves the gooseneck kettle aside from the immediate work area on the table.

segments.subtask: Prepare coffee equipment and scoop grounds

actions.label: Hold coffee carafe
actions.description: The user holds a glass coffee carafe containing brewed coffee while preparing to pour it.

actions.label: Grasp coffee scoop
actions.description: The user reaches for and grasps a small wooden measuring scoop with their right hand. The user holds a jar of coffee grounds and uses a wooden scoop to extract a portion of the grounds.

actions.label: Transfer coffee to dripper
actions.description: The user moves the scoop filled with coffee grounds towards the paper-lined coffee dripper to begin filling it. The user picks up the lid and places it onto the cylindrical coffee container to close it.

actions.label: Hold gooseneck kettle
actions.description: The person holds the gooseneck kettle, preparing to pour water into the coffee dripper. The user maintains a ready position with the gooseneck kettle, preparing to begin pouring over the coffee grounds.

actions.label: Grasp gooseneck kettle
actions.description: The user reaches for and grips the handle of the gooseneck kettle resting on the table.

actions.label: Lift gooseneck kettle
actions.description: The user lifts the kettle off the table surface to prepare for pouring. The user maintains their grip on the gooseneck kettle, preparing to pour water into the coffee dripper.

segments.subtask: Set down kettle and retrieve white bottle

actions.label: Move kettle away
actions.description: The user moves the gooseneck kettle away from the coffee dripper after pouring.

actions.label: Place kettle on table
actions.description: The user sets the kettle down on the table surface next to the dripper.

actions.label: Pick up white bottle
actions.description: The user reaches for and picks up the white bottle containing coffee beans or grounds.

actions.label: Pour liquid from white bottle
actions.description: The person holds a white bottle and pours a liquid into the coffee dripper setup on the scale.

actions.label: Close bottle cap
actions.description: The person sets down the white bottle and uses their hand to secure or tighten the cap. The user holds the white bottle and maintains a position over the coffee setup on the table.

actions.label: Place item on table
actions.description: The user finishes setting down a small container or tool on the table near the other coffee brewing equipment.

actions.label: Wait/Prepare for pouring
actions.description: The user pauses with hands near the coffee equipment and container, adjusting their position before starting the pour. The user is waiting and observing the setup on the table, with hands positioned near the coffee brewing equipment before initiating the pour.

actions.label: Pour coffee
actions.description: The person holds the carafe containing brewed coffee and pours it into the waiting coffee mug. The user holds a milk pitcher and pours milk into the cup containing coffee to create latte art or mixed coffee.

actions.label: Pour milk into coffee
actions.description: The user holds a stainless steel milk pitcher in their right hand and pours milk into the mug containing coffee, which is stabilized by their left hand.
